summary: Comprehensive testing of Cartagena Music Week App MVP completed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All screens, navigation, and integrations working correctly. Guest mode and all public features functional. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
✅ All text wrapped in Text components
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes
✅ MongoDB _id properly excluded from all API responses
✅ API calls use environment variable EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL
✅ Proper error handling and loading states throughout
✅ Auth implementation correct with Google OAuth + guest mode
✅ Mobile-first design with proper spacing (8pt grid)
⚠️ Minor: Console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' - React Native deprecation, not critical
⚠️ Minor: Package version mismatch @react-native-async-storage/async-storage (3.0.2 vs 2.2.0) - not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 15 events, 10 venues, 8 partners, 3 itineraries, 4 transport routes, 4 notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs returning correct data with proper MongoDB _id exclusion. Frontend screens loading correctly with proper React Native components. Guest mode allows full browsing. Auth-gated features (favorites, my week, notifications) properly show login prompts for unauthenticated users. Bottom tab navigation working across all 5 tabs. Event detail, transport, and itineraries screens all functional. External booking links and Google Maps integration working.

public_endpoints.GET /api/events?date=2026-01-12: ✅ Returns filtered events for specific date

home_tab.quick_access_buttons: ✅ All 4 buttons visible (Agenda, Mapa, Transporte, Rutas)
home_tab.event_card_navigation: ✅ Clicking event navigates to detail page

agenda_tab.type_filters: ✅ Event type filters visible (Sunset, Concierto, Wellness, etc.)
agenda_tab.event_cards: ✅ Event cards visible with proper styling

mapa_tab.venue_cards: ✅ Venue cards visible with images and info
mapa_tab.booking_button: ✅ 'Reservar' button visible for venues with booking links

partners_tab.certified_badge: ✅ Certified badge visible on partner cards

transport_screen.route_details: ✅ Departure times, prices, and notes visible

notifications_screen.auth_gate: ✅ Shows 'Inicia sesión para ver notificaciones' for guests
